title: Hooray for Playdates!
excerpt: Jack and Ava love playing together. Actually it's more like just hanging out with one another at this point, but it's cool. He can be a bit grabby with her, trying to pull her hair, inadvertently poking her stunning blue…
body:
Jack and Ava love playing together. Actually it's more like just hanging out with one another at this point, but it's cool. He can be a bit grabby with her, trying to pull her hair, inadvertently poking her stunning blue eyes, but all in all they are great with one another. They both have 2 bottom teeth, share toys sweetly, enjoy clapping, and look quite adorable in their red, white and blue.

Chevron Blanket by Skip Hop We've got some fun lined up for the 4th of July holiday weekend, and hope you all do too!
